title: Changes in dielectric properties following a microwave thermal ablation procedure
author: Mengchu Wang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Microwave thermal ablation (MTA) is a therapeutic technique employed for the eradication of tumors. It is based on the temperature increase achievable in biological tissues through the absorption of an electromagnetic field at microwave frequencies.
steps_raw: Microwave thermal ablation (MTA) is a therapeutic technique employed for the eradication of tumors. It is based on the temperature increase achievable in biological tissues through the absorption of an electromagnetic field at microwave frequencies.
